_comment: Store listing metadata reference. Expo runtime config now lives in app.config.ts

store.shortDescription: Build better habits with streaks, reminders & insights.
store.fullDescription:
Habit Tracker helps you build and maintain positive daily routines.

Create unlimited habits with custom colors and icons
Track streaks, completion rates, and weekly progress
Smart reminders that keep you on track
Celebration effects when you hit milestones
Optional cloud sync with Google sign-in
Home screen widgets for quick tracking
Beautiful dark themes to choose from
Privacy-first: your data stays on your device by default

Start your journey to better habits today!
